_meta.source: docs/phases/phase-5-project-association.md § S1 root cause / Available exact signals
_meta.note: io.lando.root and com.docker.compose.project are quoted verbatim from the phase doc's captured evidence. io.lando.src follows the phase doc's exact stated template ('<root>/.lando.yml', root substituted from io.lando.root above). io.lando.landofiles and the precise com.docker.compose.project.working_dir value are NOT given verbatim anywhere in the spec/phase doc (the phase doc only says the working_dir label 'points into ~/.lando/compose/<app>/' and lists io.lando.landofiles as present/corroborating, without quoting its value) — the values below for those two fields are representative reconstructions of that description, included so the fixture is a complete, realistic label set per spec 005's fixture requirement. The two fields the matcher actually decides on for this scenario (io.lando.root, and the deliberately-mismatching working_dir it must override) are exact quotes.
